gloss_en: He will go to the sea today.
notes: Future/irrealis particle ka before the verb; velar nasal in the Kimbundu-derived noun for sea. maurer1995
Preverbal ka marks non-past; the circumflex vowels mark close-mid oral quality, not nasalization. maurer1995
Equative copula tha with a predicate adjective; word-initial digraph ng is a prenasalized velar. maurer1995
Discontinuous negation with clause-final wa framing the progressive marker thêka. maurer1995
Plural pronoun ane with preverbal ka; intervocalic ng is a plain velar nasal. maurer1995

gloss_en: The table is in the house.
notes: Invariant noun with no article or agreement; word-initial digraph mb is a prenasalized labial stop. hagemeijer2009
Postalveolar affricate tx and word-initial prenasalized nd in a Kimbundu-derived noun. hagemeijer2009
Polar question by intonation with no interrogative particle; th is the interdental fricative theta. maurer1995
Bare-verb imperative; word-initial digraph ng is a prenasalized velar. maurer1995
Invariant noun subject; prenasalized velar and a close-mid oral circumflex vowel. maurer1995

gloss_en: I do not have a house.
notes: Clause-final negator wa; the circumflex on tê marks a close-mid oral vowel, not nasalization. maurer1995
First person plural pronoun no with preverbal ka. maurer1995
Bare-verb imperative addressed with the second person pronoun bô. maurer1995
Progressive particle thêka before the verb. maurer1995
Invariant noun n'na with the modal verb mêthê. maurer1995
Equative copula tha with an invariant noun subject; alveolar rhotic and word-initial prenasalized ng. maurer1995
Polar question by intonation; word-initial prenasalized ng in the word for person. maurer1995

gloss_en: He does not swim in the sea.
notes: Optional preverbal negator na with the obligatory clause-final negator wa. hagemeijer2009

gloss_en: They put the table in the house.
notes: Plural pronoun ane with preverbal ka; word-initial prenasalized mb. hagemeijer2009
Post-nominal emphatic particle a; alveolar rhotic in the participial form. maurer1995
